2026-05-19.original_title: Wondering if there is an application for this anywhere?
2026-05-19.original_content: So, I successfully was able to have Claude be in voice mode for a meeting on Zoom, and participated in the meeting as it's own role. Claude answered questions that were asked of it by 4 different people, and it kept pace without any glitches. the meeting was a 100% success... I have been looking for anyone else that can do this, and found nothing. I am asking here for ideas on what to do with this ? I did not do this with a phone, I actually had Claude in the meeting with me, and he could hear and answer straight in the meeting. submitted by /u/DirkVerite [link] [comments]
2026-05-19.chinese_title: 开发者让Claude以语音模式参与Zoom会议，成功与四人互动
2026-05-19.summary: 一位开发者在Reddit上分享让Claude以语音模式参与Zoom会议的成功案例，Claude能够听取问题并与四位不同参会者实时互动，全程无故障。
2026-05-19.extension: AI以独立身份参与多人会议并实时应答，标志着AI Agent从单轮对话向多轮协作场景的重要跨越，可能催生虚拟会议助手、AI参会代表等新应用形态。
